landing.heroSubtitle: A unified AI-powered operating layer for consultants, contractors, owners, approvals, reports, project risks, and real-time progress tracking.
landing.problemBody: Projects lose time, money, and accountability when emails, WhatsApp messages, PDFs, drawings, spreadsheets, approvals, and site reports live in disconnected places.
landing.solutionTitle: Pulse AI turns project chaos into a live operating system.
landing.solutionBody: Pulse AI centralizes project knowledge, automates documentation, detects risks, summarizes progress, and gives every stakeholder a real-time view of project health.

demoProject.name: Al Reem Tower
demoProject.location: Al Reem Island, Abu Dhabi, UAE
demoProject.aiSummary: Al Reem Tower is currently at risk, with an 18-day delay driven mainly by MEP/podium coordination and unresolved authority submission dependencies. The fastest recovery path is to freeze the vertical core, resolve podium plant-room conflicts, and lock the fire strategy before the authority package date of 08-May-2026.

pulseAssistant.name: Pulse
pulseAssistant.label: Floating AI assistant
pulseAssistant.fallback: I can answer this in the full connected version. For this demo, I am currently showing project health, delays, approvals, reports, risks, and recommended actions for Al Reem Tower.
